creator: lukasz@wasikowski.net
text:
Created attachment 167056
poudriere build fail log on FreeBSD 9.3

pecl-imagick fails to compile with php 7.0. Poudriere build logs for FreeBSD 9 and 10 are attached.

# poudriere ports -l
PORTSTREE METHOD   TIMESTAMP           PATH
default   portsnap 2016-02-15 23:44:02 /data/poudriere/ports/default

# poudriere jails -l | grep testport
testport-10 10.2-RELEASE-p12 amd64 ftp    2016-01-31 21:14:12 /data/poudriere/jails/testport-10
testport-9  9.3-RELEASE-p36  amd64 ftp    2016-01-31 21:16:33 /data/poudriere/jails/testport-9

/usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/testport-9-make.conf and /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/testport-10-make.conf is:
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=      php=7.0

poudriere bulk -j testport-9 -c graphics/pecl-imagick and poudriere bulk -j testport-10 -c graphics/pecl-imagick fails. Logs are attached.
